articles.title: CIA Buried 50 Years of Cancer Research — Ivermectin Studies Hidden in Black Budget Vault
articles.summary: Declassified documents reveal the CIA systematically suppressed research on repurposed drugs including ivermectin for cancer treatment over five decades. The intelligence agency maintained a classified database of therapeutic compounds while the public died from diseases that may have had cheap, effective treatments.

articles.title: Biden's COVID Vaccine Cover-Up: VAERS Safety Signals Deliberately Ignored
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson's bombshell report exposes how Biden administration health officials systematically suppressed COVID vaccine adverse event data and ignored clear safety signals from VAERS. The administration chose political narrative over public safety.

articles.title: WHO's Vaccine Dictatorship: Gates-Funded Supranational Authorization Scheme Exposed
articles.summary: The World Health Organization is constructing a global vaccine approval mechanism that bypasses national sovereignty, funded by Bill Gates. Officials admit to conflicts of interest while building a system that could force experimental vaccines on entire populations without democratic oversight.

articles.title: Rice University Scientist Gets 15-Year Ban for Fabricating Data — System Finally Acts After 17 Years
articles.summary: Chemist Ariel Fernández systematically fabricated research data at Rice University, but it took the Office of Research Integrity nearly two decades to impose a 15-year funding ban. The glacial response exposes how academic fraud flourishes while watchdogs sleep.

articles.title: Vitamin E Demolishes Alzheimer's Drugs — Big Pharma Buries the $2 Solution
articles.summary: A cheap vitamin supplement shows superior brain protection compared to expensive Alzheimer's pharmaceuticals, yet the medical establishment continues pushing dangerous, ineffective drugs. The pharmaceutical industry has zero incentive to promote a treatment it can't patent.

articles.title: FDA's Painkiller Label Fraud: Acetaminophen Safety Data Hidden to Protect Ibuprofen Sales
articles.summary: Despite clear evidence that acetaminophen is safer than ibuprofen for most people, the FDA refuses comparative safety labeling due to liability fears and industry pressure. Patients remain ignorant about ibuprofen's systemic organ damage while drug makers profit from confusion.

articles.title: Neuralink Whistleblower Exposes Virus-Infected Monkey Attacks on Employees
articles.summary: A former Neuralink animal care worker reveals she was brutally attacked by virus-infected monkeys during Elon Musk's brain implant experiments. The lawsuit exposes dangerous working conditions and potential health risks systematically covered up by the company.

articles.title: Lab Fraud Myths Protect Healthcare Scammers — Real Reform Blocked by Industry Lies
articles.summary: CMS's CRUSH initiative to combat healthcare fraud faces systematic obstruction through three key myths that protect laboratory scammers. The healthcare establishment spreads disinformation to derail genuine reform efforts that would expose widespread billing fraud.

articles.title: CIA Buried 50 Years of Cancer Research on Ivermectin and Other Drugs
articles.summary: For half a century, the CIA deliberately concealed research showing potential cancer treatments including ivermectin. This systematic suppression denied patients access to potentially life-saving treatments while Big Pharma profited from expensive alternatives.

articles.title: FDA's Painkiller Labels Hide Truth About Ibuprofen's Deadly Side Effects
articles.summary: Despite acetaminophen being safer than ibuprofen for most patients, the FDA refuses to allow comparative safety information on drug labels. The agency's liability fears and per-drug mandate keep consumers in the dark about ibuprofen's systemic damage to stomach, heart, and kidneys.

articles.title: Rice University Chemist Gets 15-Year Ban After 17 Years of Cover-Up
articles.summary: The Office of Research Integrity finally debarred chemist Ariel Fernández for fabricating data, but only after a staggering 17-year delay. This glacial pace reveals how academic institutions protect fraudulent researchers while genuine science suffers.

articles.title: WHO Building Global Vaccine Approval System With Gates Foundation Ties
articles.summary: The World Health Organization is constructing a supranational vaccine authorization mechanism while key officials admit conflicts of interest with Bill Gates. This represents the ultimate capture of global health policy by private interests.

articles.title: Senate Report: Biden Officials Deliberately Ignored COVID Vaccine Safety Signals
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson's investigation reveals Biden administration health officials systematically suppressed VAERS safety data and ignored COVID vaccine side effects. The deliberate cover-up prioritized vaccine promotion over patient safety.

articles.title: Robert Malone Exposes AI's Role in 'Synformation' and Epistemic Capture
articles.summary: Dr. Robert Malone details how artificial intelligence is being weaponized to create 'synformation' - the merger of information control with AI systems. This represents the next evolution of scientific censorship and epistemic capture by establishment interests.

articles.title: Medical Establishment Attacks CDC Panel for Allowing Patient Choice
articles.summary: The Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices faces fierce criticism for suggesting 'shared decision-making' between doctors and patients. The medical establishment's rage reveals their preference for mandates over informed consent.

articles.summary: A former Neuralink animal care worker was attacked by monkeys infected with dangerous viruses during Elon Musk's brain implant experiments. The lawsuit exposes the hidden dangers and ethical violations in high-profile neurotechnology research.

The intelligence agency deliberately withheld potentially life-saving therapeutic data while Americans died from diseases these cheap, off-patent medications could treat.

articles.title: FDA Labels Hide Deadly Truth — Acetaminophen Safer Than Ibuprofen Despite Industry Fear Campaign
articles.summary: Analysis reveals FDA's liability fears prevent honest comparative safety warnings on pain medications. Despite acetaminophen's narrow therapeutic window, ibuprofen's systematic organ damage makes it more dangerous — but drug labels won't tell patients the truth.

articles.title: Rice University Scientist Gets 15-Year Ban — But Research Fraud Took 17 Years to Punish
articles.summary: Office of Research Integrity finally bans chemist Ariel Fernández for data fabrication, but the misconduct occurred in 2009. The glacial pace of accountability shows how broken the research integrity system has become when fraudsters get nearly two decades of career protection.

articles.title: Psychiatry Protects Paxil Fraud Paper — 'Expression of Concern' Pathetic Response to Massive Settlement
articles.summary: Despite GSK paying massive settlements for Paxil safety fraud, psychiatric journals refuse to retract misleading safety papers. Consumers who suffered from hidden suicide risks get only an 'expression of concern' while the fraudulent research remains in the literature.

articles.summary: Investigation reveals historical pattern of vaccine enforcement through manufactured fear campaigns, from 1853 Vaccination Act through Jacobson v. Massachusetts to modern mandates. The Cutter Incident of 1955 shows how rushed approvals and corporate capture create ongoing public health disasters.
